most_people_never_ask_why_they:
Most people never ask why they hold on. You did. That kind of honesty
          is where real change begins.
come_back_whenever_you_re_read: Come back whenever you're ready to explore another. 🌸
answer_whichever_feels_right_y: Answer whichever feels right. You can skip any.
write_freely_this_is_just_for_: Write freely — this is just for you. 💭
sometimes_objects_hold_more_th:
Sometimes objects hold more than things. They hold feelings we haven't
          found another place for yet.
what_is_this_object_really_hol: What is this object really holding for you?
naming_it_doesn_t_mean_you_hav:
Naming it doesn't mean you have to act on it. Awareness itself is the
          work. 🌸
every_entry_is_a_moment_of_cou: Every entry is a moment of courage.
your_journal_is_waiting_start_: Your journal is waiting. Start your first reflection today.
every_object_you_keep_is_keepi: "Every object you keep is keeping something for you."
this_isn_t_about_clearing_spac:
This isn't about clearing space. It's about understanding what your
          things are holding. 🌸
think_of_one_item_you_ve_been_:
Think of one item you've been holding onto. Whatever comes to mind
          first is the right one. ✨
e_g_my_mother_s_old_scarf_a_br: e.g. my mother's old scarf, a broken watch
